samples.text: All mammals produce milk. Snakes are reptiles, not mammals. Therefore, do snakes produce milk because they are mammals?
Every mammal is capable of producing milk. Snakes belong to the reptile category rather than the mammal category. Does this imply that snakes produce milk because they are mammals?
All mammalian animals produce milk. Snakes are reptilian creatures rather than mammalian animals. Therefore, do snakes produce milk because they are mammals?
Snakes are classified as reptiles. Mammals are animals that produce milk. Based on this information, do snakes produce milk because they are mammals?
All mammals produce milk. Snakes are reptiles, not mammals. Some snakes are venomous. Therefore, do snakes produce milk because they are mammals?
